fieldValues.value: RFC-022 accepted — relational-states design over transition-marker and new-verb alternatives

Resolves the seven open questions of the original issue draft: obligation named on the state as a requiresRelation object (OQ1), relationType explicit with no implicit supersedes default (OQ2), no new CLI verb — fulfillment on record transition (OQ3), hard rejection with the already-satisfied escape hatch (OQ4), graceful per-lifecycle opt-in with the governance package migrated as the reference example (OQ5), warning-severity at-rest validation (OQ6), marked-projection design now with pure relational derivation recorded as the north star (OQ7).
